review_title: Great Price for What You Get
description: OTC was great. We used it for 4.5 years I think. The cost fit our budget, and it became easy to figure out.
author: Tiffany G.
pros: The cost of the version we were using was fantastic for what it provided us and for as long as it provided us for what we needed at the time. It was also user friendly once we figured out the idiosyncracies.
cons: It was limited for our usage when it came to scheduling. We had to use work-arounds, which we did...until we grew too big as a company, and those became too cumbersome.

description: Open Time Clock has been a valuable tool for our hourly employees. It's made keeping track of their hours so much simpler than what we were using before.
author: Amy P.
pros: The easy to use apps both on phone and desktop are very handy and easy to navigate. The timesheets are detailed with all the information we need for our employees who work hourly.
cons: Sometimes there are issues with clocking in or out; but it's easily fixed by logging in via a browser. It can just be frustrating sometimes to think you've been clocked in but really haven't.

description: Moved from ancient time clock to this so anything is better.
author: Jennifer P.
pros: Easy to clock in and out. Can add notes to your clock times. Track PTO, sick days taken, customizable date range.
cons: Web based and regularly unstable. Makes it impossible for everyone to clock out. May just be our network but it's just not to consistent.

author: Magdalena D.
pros: Open Time Clock makes better time management, and there are useful reminders for every company.
cons: Open Time Clock makes useful time assistance for all companies.

description: I recommend Open Time Clock to anyone looking for a time clock solution.
author: Jeffrey B.
pros: Open Time Clock is an excellent cost-effective tool for clocking in and out of work. They provide an easy-to-use back-end tool for setting up users and schedules. Their customizable reports have reduced time spent on payroll and accounting. They offer a free and paid version, with a few perks with the free version.
cons: I really enjoy Open Time Clock, it's provided us a cost-effective way to manage our payroll.

description: 100% satisfied and will surely recommend to other companies. Very affordable in pricing.
author: Freddie M.
pros: Very user' friendly. Have a great experience with customer service support. They responded very quickly on all my issues. Very useful tools and reports.
cons: Just perhaps an update of the app must be informed on each account holders to avoid login issues. Nobody knows that installing the latest app will solve their login app issue.

description: Great! I would recommend it to any company looking to find a nice, easy time tracking software for their employees.
author: Phoebe W.
pros: We use the free version of this software and it is a wonderful product for our company. Our employees are able to clock in and out from any computer and I am able to see schedules and track hours with ease. Out of all the office time clock softwares I've used, this is my favorite.
cons: I have had some issues with it not working with IP addresses and we have had to go back and forth in customer service chats to get the issue resolved. Other than that, it's fantastic.

author: miri L.
pros: simple and cheapest software for employees clocking in and out
cons: i dont see any cons in the software. it's easy to use and has what it needs for schedule tracking

review_title: Pretty good for a free software
description: We used the free version so it wasn’t the best. I’m not sure how the paid version works. Overall, it got us by until we bought a new software (ClockIt).
author: Stuart P.
pros: Worked well and didn’t crash too often. Free! Easy to use. Customizable. Nice mobile app.
cons: Because it was free, almost no support services. Sometimes the clockins didn’t register.

description: I liked that the employees could punch in and out track their time easily. Easy to set up and change as employees changed.
author: Rae T.
pros: Loved that this was a web based software, no machines, no fees!!!
cons: Should of read disclosure better! No fee version does not let you print reports!!

description: En general ha sido una muy buena estrategia para llevar el control de horas laborales, facil de manejar y de enseñar a las diferentes personas y permite acceso en tiempo real de las horas de trabajo.
author: Angelica T.
pros: Ha sido una forma de llevar el control de las tiempos de un grupo de empleados, y me ayuda a llevar mucho el control de horas para mi trabajo.
cons: A veces el sistema se cae y no lleva control de las horas y debemos ingresarlas manualmente, pero hemos detectado que es por el internet la mayoría de las veces.

description: Overall, it's been easy and efficient and just what we need!
author: Dani M.
pros: So easy to use, didn't even have to be trained. Love using it to track my hours, and there are ways to leave comments if you need management to tweak your hours. The vacation request space is also very user friendly.
cons: It tends to log me out, but now that my computer saved my info it's a lot faster again.

author: July P.
pros: They have a free version of employee time tracking
cons: There are no cons to this software.

description: I loved this product. Could see who was in the office or out.
author: Jenna G.
pros: Great software for Free if you don't want to pay for a company to record your time. Easy to use and easy to set up.
cons: Nothing this software is great to use especially for a company that is just starting off and need to save money

review_title: Simple, easy to use time clock software
description: We have been able to keep a better eye on our productivity and manage our employees time.
author: Erika H.
pros: We love that it is easy to clock in and out for our team and that we can easily run payroll reports and track overtime.
cons: I wish it imported directly to ADP to make processing payroll even faster

author: Amber G.
pros: This software is awesome for clocking in and out at work. It is so easy to use and edit. My boss can print them out and send them to her accountant.
cons: The only thing I don’t like about this software is when I try to log in and look at my time it will sometimes think I’m clocking in or out but it’s easy to edit that.

review_title: Amazing free program for time sheets control and record.
description: It is a great and free option to have records over your employees working times.
author: Sonia E.
pros: What I like most it's that is completely free, it allows you to have control over the time your employees are working, view time sheets, and it has unlimited employees to add. It is great for any type of businesses.
cons: Support is completely by e-mail. They don't have a phone number for support or assistance.

review_title: Easy for what it is used for
author: Emily T.
pros: I used this software when I was hourly at my job. We used to write down and turn in our time sheets which was very problematic and time consuming. Open Time Clock was easy and efficient.
cons: The software can be confusing for the first couple of months you are using it.

description: I think this is a great tool that we will continue to use!
author: Laura G.
pros: This is potentially a free time tracking software that allows you to track employees time without having to pay.
cons: The PTO accruals is a bit tricky with carryforeard time off. But if you are a small business you should be able to take the time to make it work.

review_title: Great feature to check employees time
description: Great free time clock for the business!
author: Yessenia S.
pros: It's a free time clock to check employees time. It is pretty easy to setup accounts and for employees to clock in and out. The free version has unlimited managers and employees to add, which is great!
cons: Sometimes clock in hours didn't appear.

author: Rick N.
pros: What I liked about the software is that is free! and for companies over 50 employees like Rocky's is just ridiculous to leave a bad review with a company with so many employees like that he should purchase a software instead of looking for a free solution, that is just being cheap, this software is free and is perfect for a company that has not much money to invest, so this free software needs our support money and help I suggest we help them at the very least giving a good review and feedback so they fix their mistakes if they have any
cons: no cons is free, nothing could ever be wrong when cost you nothing
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: at least to try the online web clock to see if its possible
author: Rocky M.
pros: WEB TIME CLOCK
cons: LITTLE OR NO SUPPORT - OUT OF A DOZEN EMAIL/CHAT ONLY A FEW RESPONSES AND OF COURSE THEY ALWAYS 'CLOSE' THE CASE AS SUCCESSFUL WHEN THEY REPLY NO COMMUNICATION TO SEE IF IT REALLY IS.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: GREAT FOR KEEPING TRACK OF CONTRACTORS
description: My company primarily works with contractors. Though paid an hourly wage, our contractors are able to work their own schedules and work remotely from any device. We need a better sysyem in place to offer in keeping daily track of when our contractors were working as we contract hours out weekly for tasks and assignments. This system was perfect for this so we could assess productivity compared to quality of work.
author: AJ M.

description: Good basic attendance and login recording system. Pros: User-friendly dashboard. Employee time clock. Generates payroll. Time sheet generation. Unlimited Managers & Employees. Free system. Cons: No shift scheduling system Site is linked to: freetimeclock.com & parktime.com not explained if affiliated or not.
author: Raymel L.

review_title: I like that free version includes clock in/clock out, automatic payroll calculation, & mobile access
author: Paul G.
pros: The basic version is, however, free for unlimited users and employees.
cons: To get that you need to upgrade to the standard plan. Unfortunately, the free version doesn't include reporting or web-camera functionality. This web-based system is not, as the name might suggest, actually open source No Invoice, No Reporting
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
